ATL.note: Moderate upside, potential for significant roster changes, cap status dependent on core.

BOS.note: Tatum returns healthy, over second apron, severe trade restrictions, win-now mode.

BKN.note: Rebuilding/retooling, moderate cap flexibility, active in trade market.

CHA.note: Young core, significant cap flexibility, full trade flexibility, buyers at deadline.

CHI.note: Roster in flux, limited cap flexibility, potential sellers.

CLE.note: Over second apron, limiting trades/exceptions. Harden's option decision is crucial for flexibility.

DET.note: Rebuilding, young core, significant cap room, acquiring assets.

IND.note: Haliburton returns healthy, young core, likely cap flexibility, buyers at deadline.

MIA.note: Hard-capped at first apron, Wiggins' player option is key trade chip, limited flexibility.

MIL.note: Contending core, under first apron, moderate flexibility, buyers at deadline.

NYK.note: Competitive core, very close to second apron, limited trade flexibility, buyers.

ORL.note: Young core, first apron limits trade flexibility, Banchero/Wagner extensions kick in.

PHI.note: Embiid/Maxey core, hard-capped at first apron, limited trade flexibility after George trade.

TOR.note: Hard-capped at first apron, Scottie Barnes' max contract, limited trade flexibility.

WAS.note: Rebuilding with #1 pick AJ Dybantsa, significant cap room, acquiring assets.

DAL.note: Contending core with Anthony Davis, limited cap flexibility, buyers at deadline.

DEN.note: Championship core, likely over second apron, severe trade restrictions, stand-pat.

GSW.note: Over second apron, severe trade restrictions, capped out, relies on Curry.

HOU.note: Young core, Durant's contract, cap flexibility dependent on Eason/FVV decisions, potential trade activity.

LAC.note: Veteran core, likely over second apron, potential injury concerns, limited flexibility.

LAL.note: Luka Doncic era, Anthony Davis gone, likely buyers, aiming to contend.

MEM.note: Young core, Ja Morant's health/availability key, buyers at deadline, moderate flexibility.

MIN.note: Talented core, likely over second apron, severe trade restrictions, stand-pat.

NOP.note: Zion's health is key, limited cap flexibility, close to first apron, potential trade activity.

OKC.note: Star young core, over second apron, severe trade restrictions, likely to shed salary (Dort).

PHX.note: Over second apron, severe trade restrictions, capped out, upside relies on current star performance.

POR.note: Rebuilding, young core, cap flexibility, acquiring assets.

SAC.note: Over first apron, LaVine's large contract, limited cap flexibility, likely stand-pat.

SAS.note: Deep young core, significant cap flexibility, high upside, buyers at deadline.

UTA.note: Rebuilding/retooling, good cap flexibility, potential for significant roster changes.
